title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.240 - Dams deemed public nuisances, when
text:
236.240.  Dams deemed public nuisances, when. — All dams, stoppages and obstructions not made according to law shall be deemed to be public nuisances, and may be dealt with as such.
(RSMo 1939 § 10309) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9180; 1919 § 7422; 1909 § 5479
